lines.speaker: Citlalli
lines.text: Tetamo! This is a total disaster!

lines.speaker: Citlalli
lines.text: Yes! I don't know where they came from, but my basement is filled with them! At best, they're stealing all my things, but at worst, they're just destroying them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Citlalli
lines.text: Thank you for the offer, but I don't think so.
